ogTitle: Sans Souci vs Sapphire Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sans Souci and Sapphire Beach.
heading: Sans Souci vs Sapphire Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sans Souci, New South Wales and Sapphire Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sapphire Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Sans Souci (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sans Souci or Sapphire Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sans Souci has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Sapphire Beach scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sans Souci scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Sapphire Beach scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sans Souci or Sapphire Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sapphire Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
